message:
✨ Expand tank catalog, fix water type filter, and wire wizard to calculator (#16)

- Add 13 new tank products covering 5–125 gallon range (16 total)
- Fix water type filter: "both" products now match any selection
- Add waterType to PEX_PLUMBING and AQUARIUM_CONTROLS products
- Calculator passes recommended size to Build Your Tank wizard via URL param
- Wizard filters tanks to only show sizes >= recommended minimum
- Add info banner in wizard explaining the size filter

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
